summary: Frontend acceptance testing for iter38 (VELA INVEST cinematic rebuild + Highest Performing Version + 9-tab bar + Manual Assisted Analysis rename). All 14 review_request features verified end-to-end via Playwright on desktop (1920x1080). 0 functional bugs. INVEST landing copy: kicker 'VELA INVEST · Acquisition Underwriting', headline 'Acquire what others / don\'t see.', subtitle includes 'highest-performing version' + 'institutional-grade — not a guess', trust line tightened, Manual CTA renamed to 'Manual Assisted Analysis™'. /invest/asset/demo plays cinematic THINKING (7 phases: Extracting listing data → Cross-validating metadata vs DOM → Reading visual positioning → Calculating hidden yield → Scanning local demand signals → Detecting revenue leakage → Building transformation pathways with kicker 'VELA · Acquisition Intelligence') → OPENER (VELA INVEST INDEX animates 0→71/100, Acquisition DNA 'MARGIN-OF-SAFETY PASS', Verdict Preview chip 'VERDICT · PASS', 3 Top Institutional Signals, Open Investor Terminal CTA) → Dashboard. Dashboard has all 9 tabs (overview/potential/actions/financials/str-potential/renovation-plan/risk-flags/exit-strategy/final-verdict), all 9 invest sections + tab-bar, HPV section: 'What this property is capable of becoming.' with Current State (€111 ADR · 3.3% yield · €2,368/mo · RENOVATION) → After VELA · Stabilized (€176 ADR · 3.2% yield · €4,605/mo · OPTIMIZED) and +€26,848/yr badge. Potential tab scrolls 0→831 placing HPV at top (top=110px). All 9 tabs scroll-spy correctly. Manual route /invest/asset/manual skips cinematic, renders dashboard + EditInputsPanel directly. OPERATE regression: /operate landing renders unchanged. Home '/' loads.
critical_code_review_comments: Live demo measurement: VELA INVEST INDEX displayed 71/100 (not the 68 stated in the smoke note) on first run and 47 mid-animation on a re-render — minor drift from spec's '~68' but within tolerance since target value is computed deterministically by computeInvestIntelligence. Confirm with product whether spec value should be updated to reflect the actual investIntelligence.js output.

InvestOpener continue button uses opacity-0 + pointer-events-none until phase==='ready' (~3.2s after opener mount). wait_for_selector(state='visible') still resolves while opacity is 0, so testers must explicitly wait ~3.5-4s after opener appears OR add a data-testid='invest-opener-continue-btn-ready' wrapper toggled on phase==='ready' for cleaner test ergonomics. Functional behavior is correct, just a testability nit.
Pre-existing console 401 noise from /api/me probe still present (carry-over from iter34+). Recommend wrapping the auth probe in try/catch to suppress benign 401s.

Theme/contract integrity preserved: HPV section uses semantic HTML, all expected testids present (invest-section-hpv, invest-hpv-heading, invest-hpv-current, invest-hpv-current-positioning, invest-hpv-after, invest-hpv-after-positioning). Cinematic intro stages use a clean STAGE machine — no over-engineering.
INVEST_TABS array now correctly has 9 entries with 'Potential' inserted at index 1 and mapped to invest-section-hpv — verified via scroll-spy click test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter38 verified: (a) /invest landing — kicker 'VELA INVEST · Acquisition Underwriting', headline 'Acquire what others / don\'t see.' (with bronze span on second line), subtitle 'Paste any listing. VELA extracts price, location, condition, and the highest-performing version of the asset. Institutional-grade — not a guess.', trust line 'VELA never calculates from unverified data. Every field shows confidence — low-confidence fields require confirmation before analysis runs.', Manual CTA 'Manual Assisted Analysis™' (data-testid='invest-manual-cta') routes to /invest/asset/manual. (b) /invest/asset/demo cinematic flow: invest-thinking renders immediately with kicker 'VELA · Acquisition Intelligence' and 7 phases (invest-thinking-phase-0..6 in exact order: Extracting listing data, Cross-validating metadata vs DOM, Reading visual positioning, Calculating hidden yield, Scanning local demand signals, Detecting revenue leakage, Building transformation pathways) → after ~4.5s transitions to invest-opener with invest-opener-vela-index animating 0→71/100, invest-opener-dna-category 'Acquisition DNA · Margin-of-Safety Pass', invest-opener-verdict-preview 'VERDICT · PASS', 3 invest-opener-insight-0/1/2 (Asking 8.7% above Smart-Buy envelope · Net yield below institutional floor 2.9% · Design upside 84/100 asymmetric ADR lever) → after ~3.2s invest-opener-continue-btn 'Open Investor Terminal' becomes clickable (NOTE: testers must wait full 3.5-4s after opener mount, or click() will silently no-op due to pointer-events-none on the button) → click → invest-dashboard renders. (c) Dashboard: all 9 invest-section-* present (verdict/hpv/wwvd/roi/comps/transformation/negotiation/max-buy/final-verdict) + invest-tab-bar. (d) Tab bar: all 9 invest-tab-* tabs (overview/potential/actions/financials/str-potential/renovation-plan/risk-flags/exit-strategy/final-verdict). Click each scrolls progressively (overview=531, potential=831 puts HPV at top=110px, actions=1434, financials=2708, str-potential=3959, renovation-plan=4610, risk-flags=5239, exit-strategy=5824, final-verdict=7290). (e) HPV section: heading 'What this property is capable of becoming.', invest-hpv-current contains 'Current State / ADR €111 / Net Yield 3.3% / Monthly Rev €2,368 / RENOVATION', invest-hpv-after contains 'After VELA · Stabilized / +€26,848/yr badge / Premium VELA Editorial / ADR €176 / Net Yield 3.2% / Monthly Rev €4,605 / OPTIMIZED'. (f) /invest/asset/manual: skips cinematic (introStage starts at DONE), invest-dashboard renders directly with EditInputsPanel form fields. (g) invest-back-btn navigates back to /invest landing. (h) OPERATE regression: /operate landing renders unchanged with VELA OPERATE copy + 'Optimize Existing Asset' / 'Analyze Acquisition' CTAs — no console errors, no test ID regressions. (i) Home / loads. (j) Console errors: only 2 benign 401s from /api/me probe (pre-existing, not iter38 regression).
rca of the issue: No issues — feature ship is clean. Single ergonomic note: invest-opener-continue-btn becomes interactive ~3.2s after opener mount (phase==='ready'); before that opacity-0 + pointer-events-none silently swallow clicks. Test scripts must wait for the ready phase explicitly. Functional behavior is correct.
